projects.name: V2Ray
projects.author: v2fly
projects.description: Advanced tool for building proxy networks, supporting multiple protocols including VMess, VLESS, Trojan, etc. One of the most popular proxy solutions available

projects.name: Xray-core
projects.author: XTLS
projects.description: Xray project core, supporting latest protocols like VLESS and XTLS. Outstanding performance with flexible configuration, a strong competitor to V2Ray

projects.name: sing-box
projects.author: SagerNet
projects.description: Universal proxy platform supporting proxy, rule-based routing, TUN mode, and more. Feature-rich with concise configuration

projects.name: Clash
projects.author: Dreamacro
projects.description: High-performance proxy software written in Go, supporting Shadowsocks, VMess, Trojan, and more. Excellent rule-based routing capabilities

projects.name: Clash.Meta
projects.author: MetaCubeX
projects.description: Enhanced fork of Clash, supporting more protocols and features including WireGuard, TUIC, etc. Compatible with more rule formats

projects.name: mihomo
projects.author: MetaCubeX
projects.description: Fork based on Clash.Meta, focused on better performance and more features. The spiritual successor to Clash Meta

projects.name: Shadowsocks Rust
projects.author: shadowsocks
projects.description: Secure SOCKS5 proxy implemented in Rust, supporting multiple encryption methods with excellent performance

projects.name: Trojan
projects.author: trojan-gfw
projects.description: Proxy tool focused on bypassing firewalls, using TLS encryption to appear as normal HTTPS traffic with strong stealth

projects.name: Hysteria
projects.author: tobyxdd
projects.description: High-speed proxy tool based on QUIC protocol, performing exceptionally well in high packet loss network environments

projects.name: Hysteria 2
projects.author: apernet
projects.description: Next generation of Hysteria with upgraded protocol, stronger performance, and simpler configuration

projects.name: TUIC
projects.author: EAimTY
projects.description: Proxy tool based on QUIC protocol with low latency and high speed. Simple configuration with multiple authentication methods

projects.name: NaïveProxy
